goal: Switch the current implementation mainline back to the existing local-fixed MCP SuperAssistant extension and only enhance that plugin for current usable features.
non_goals: Do not continue implementing extensions/web-agents-extension in the current mainline.
Do not replace the legacy MCP SuperAssistant user experience with a popup-only prototype.
Do not rewrite the bundled extension unless a focused adapter fix is required.
acceptance_criteria: Root README identifies extensions/mcp-superassistant-local-fixed as the current usable plugin.
PRD/ARCH/TODO identify the legacy plugin as the current mainline and the new extension as an experimental rewrite only.
Legacy plugin README includes Doubao in supported providers and describes Doubao smoke testing.
ADworkflo active task spec targets legacy-local-fixed-mainline.
Next implementation steps only touch the legacy plugin or local MCP/gateway execution layer unless explicitly redirected by the user.
